no_changes_rationale:
All acceptance criteria for ddx-36eb046c are already satisfied in the current codebase.

The fix was committed in 9a3ad75a5 ("fix(work): serialize model-backed readiness behind atomic claim [ddx-36eb046c]") prior to this execution worktree's base rev 501791cb0.

Evidence:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go: Store.Claim at line 687 precedes PreClaimIntakeHook at line 722 (AC #6 wired-in)
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_preclaim_serial_test.go: all 4 AC tests present
  - TestExecuteBeadWorkerConcurrentPreClaimIntakeRunsOncePerBead (AC #1)
  - TestExecuteBeadWorkerConcurrentPreDispatchLintDoesNotDuplicateEvents (AC #2)
  - TestPreClaimIntakeRewriteRequiresOwnedReservation (AC #3)
  - TestExecuteBeadWorkerReadinessRejectReleasesOrParksClaim (AC #4)
- TestExecuteBeadWorkerConcurrentWorkersDoNotDoubleExecuteSameBead and TestExecuteLoop_TwoWorkersBothClaimP0sBeforeP2s still pass (AC #5)

verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/bead/... -run "TestExecuteBeadWorkerConcurrentPreClaim|TestExecuteBeadWorkerConcurrentPreDispatch|TestPreClaimIntakeRewriteRequiresOwnedReservation|TestExecuteBeadWorkerReadinessReject|TestExecuteBeadWorkerConcurrentWorkersDoNotDoubleExecuteSameBead|TestExecuteLoop_TwoWorkersBothClaimP0sBeforeP2s" -count=1
